title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India:
Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colgate-Palmolive India Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
